name: Sylvia Sidney
abstract: Sylvia Sidney (born Sophia Kosow; August 8, 1910 – July 1, 1999) was an American stage, screen, and film actress whose career spanned over 70 years. She rose to prominence in dozens of leading roles in the 1930s.

about_quotes.speaker: Lawrence Brown
about_quotes.evidence: oneof our 7- one of our first actresses I remember was Sylvia Sidney. And the -- in fact we worked so many of them that I can't keep track of the stars.
